sizing_rule.note: Buy number of contracts from optimal_f corresponding to highest geometric mean among all mandated exit date scenarios. Optimal f recalculates daily as data updates. Only trade if geometric mean > 1.0. This is Ralph Vince's optimal f method applied to multi-scenario exit date analysis.

source_rule_text: Buy the number of contracts indicated by the optimal f corresponding to the mandated exit date that produces the highest geometric mean, provided that geometric mean is greater than 1.0
